---
title: "Math Explanation Page"
id: "mod001-se01-sec05-sp03"
section_id: "mod001-se01-sec05"
session_id: "mod001-se01"
toc: false
---











---

<!-- START_INTERACTIONS -->
<!-- editable:start interaction_intro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add an introduction for this conceptual explanation._]
<!-- editable:end -->

::: {.math-explanation data-variant="conceptual"}
**Conceptual Logic**

$$ e = mc^2 $$

**Context:**
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Provide a conceptual explanation._]
:::

<!-- editable:start interaction_outro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a summary or reflection prompt._]
<!-- editable:end -->

---

<!-- editable:start interaction_intro -->
[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Set the scene for this timeline or chronological sequence._]
<!-- editable:end -->

::: {.timeline}
**Developmental Timeline**

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add the staged development or sequence of events here._]
:::

<!-- editable:start interaction_outro -->

[AUTHOR GUIDE: _Add a summary or reflection prompt after the timeline._]
<!-- editable:end -->
<!-- END_INTERACTIONS -->

<!-- START_NAVIGATION -->


```{=html}
<div class="custom-page-navigation">
    <div class="nav-prev">
        
        <a href="mod001-se01-sec05-sp02.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">← Previous</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Code Output Page</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
    <div class="nav-next">
        
        <a href="mod001-se01-sec05-sp04.qmd">
            <span class="nav-label">Next →</span>
            <span class="nav-title">Worked Calculation Page</span>
        </a>
        
    </div>
</div>
```

<!-- END_NAVIGATION -->
